name: Zucchini Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place all ingredients (except liquids and yeast) inside the bread pan.
3. Add the liquid ingredients: water and milk.
4. Close the cover and place the dry yeast into the yeast holder.
5. Press start and bake for the recommended time.
